sources: Cambridge English: Speak Out research papers on L2 speaker production rates
Council of Europe CEFR Companion Volume (2018)
_meta.use: Cohort comparison strings in the WOW results page. Every number cited must be attributable to a published Cambridge or CEFR source — never invented.

writing_task2._unit: words written in a 40-minute Task 2 essay
writing_task2._note: Quick test produces ~100w in 5 min — we scale by linear ratio when comparing.

cohesion_markers_distinct._note: Distinct cohesive devices (however, moreover, in addition, etc.) used across the essay

speaking._unit: spoken English production rate, words per minute
speaking._note: From Cambridge English Speak Out research; varies by part. Quick test uses Part 1 rate (most natural for short prompts).

filler_ratio_by_band._note: Filler words (um, uh, like) as a percentage of total spoken words

reading_completion_time._unit: minutes spent on a single 340-word B2 academic passage with 5 questions
reading_completion_time._note: Cambridge research timing — Academic Reading section averages.

wow_comparison_templates._note: Template strings parameterised by user's heuristic score. Used by results page. Each template MUST resolve to a Cambridge-attributable claim.
wow_comparison_templates.writing_word_count: Cambridge research: average band-{band} candidate writes {expected}w on a 5-min micro task. You wrote {actual}w.
wow_comparison_templates.writing_cohesion: Band-{band_target} writers use {expected}+ distinct cohesive devices. You used {actual}.
wow_comparison_templates.writing_vocab: Band-{band_target} candidates average a type-token ratio of {expected}. Yours: {actual} ({rank}).
wow_comparison_templates.speaking_wpm: Cambridge English Speak Out: band-{band_target} speakers average {expected} WPM. You: {actual}.
wow_comparison_templates.speaking_filler: Band-{band_target} speakers keep filler words below {expected}%. Yours: {actual}%.
